headline: How The Investment Story For U.S. Bancorp (USB) Is Shifting With New Analyst Signals
summary: The latest analyst update for U.S. Bancorp includes a small change in the fair value estimate, from US$63.95 to US$64.18, keeping the price target effectively in the same range as before. That tweak lines up with recent research that sounds generally constructive, with several firms lifting targets while others stay more cautious as they weigh net interest margin trends, capital deployment plans, and the BTIG acquisition. Read on to see how you can track these shifting views and what they...
